CustomMetadata.label: GU-003 - Guest profile can Create on Acc

values.value: Guest profile can Create on Account or Contact
Guest user object permissions allow Create=true on Account or Contact. Anonymous visitors can insert records into your core CRM objects without authentication.
Anonymous visitors can inject Account and Contact spam records at scale, polluting your CRM data and potentially triggering downstream workflows, integrations, or billing calculations.

Remove Create permission from the guest profile on Account and Contact. Use authenticated Experience Cloud members or Apex-managed system-context flows for any legitimate record creation from public-facing forms.
